uplink.description: Status report, no leak, normal battery (fPort 6)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data authored from this module's normalization. Wire-format understanding cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js, which decodes Volt 3.6, ReplenishWaterCount 100, FaultAlarm Normal, TankLeakAlarm NoLeak.

uplink.description: Status report, leak detected, fault, low battery (fPort 6)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte 3 high bit set flags low battery. Wire-format understanding cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js, which decodes Volt '3.6(low battery)', ReplenishWaterCount 200, FaultAlarm Fault, TankLeakAlarm Leak.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic; config responses are not measurements. Upstream decodes this as a ConfigReportRsp.
